user.title: Connect to Pi Node
user.description: Enter the SSH connection details for your Raspberry Pi.

data.ssh_key: SSH private key (paste full key contents)

description_placeholders.ssh_key_hint: Paste the full contents of your private key (e.g. ~/.ssh/id_rsa)

services.title: Select Services
services.description:
Choose which services to install on **{node_summary}**.

Required dependencies (apt packages, Python libs) will be installed automatically.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect — check host, port, and SSH key
error.preflight_failed: Connected but preflight checks failed — check that Python 3 and systemd are present
error.no_services_selected: Select at least one service to install
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs
